title: The Crew Is Scattered: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: Hey, hey... you're looking pretty pathetic, px-4....!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I have no reason to answer you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Before we run into the Admiral ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: Okay, thanks! Let's hurry up and go!!

dialogue.text: Uhh...!! hang on!! usopp, I'm already...

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: They're splitting up!!! Pursue them, px-1!!!
